## What

One or two sentences on the change.

## Why

What problem this solves. Link the issue if there is one.

## How to verify

Steps a reviewer can run locally to confirm it works.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (typecheck + bundle)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] README or CONTRIBUTING updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No new dependencies added without prior discussion
- [ ] Strutter branding preserved (turkey logo, green palette, "by Strutter AI" tagline)
